name: 无敌荒野/Unbeatable wilderness
short_description: This is a 3D game. The game simulates a real field environment, with real day and night alternation and variable weather effects. Both in the land and underwater can catch prey, the player in the capture of prey but also beware of the attack of beasts, players can also hunt beasts.
detailed_description: This is a 3D game. The game simulates a real field environment, with real day and night alternation and variable weather effects. Both in the land and underwater can catch prey, the player in the capture of prey but also beware of the attack of beasts, players can also hunt beasts. There are birds hiding in the grass. These birds can also be caught. Players can climb trees to look for eggs and avoid predators chasing. There are hidden underwater grass fish, these fish can be caught, the water can also hurt the player's creatures . . The catch is carried to a hotel (the house where the game begins) for gold coins, which are used to unlock weapons. . . The game will not only develop, create larger maps and more features to get better results.

supported_languages:
English*, Simplified Chinese*, Japanese*, Arabic*, Korean*
*languages with full audio support
